description_long: An adult male figure is depicted wearing a collared, long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut trousers, with the shirt tucked in for a neat appearance. The figure's arms are relaxed and extended slightly downward along the sides, and the hands are open and visible. The shoes are robust and appear suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The hairstyle is short and neatly combed, giving a tidy and well-groomed look. The clothing style suggests a casual yet presentable urban outfit, appropriate for city streets or public spaces. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is upright and natural.
description: A neatly dressed adult male in a collared shirt and trousers, standing upright with arms at his sides and short, tidy hair. The figure is ready for urban environments and shows no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and upper back, highlighting the shirt's fit and hairstyle.
description_view_1: Side profile view displaying the straight posture, arm alignment, and the full length of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back, legs, and shoes, with both arms visible and slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the other arm, side of the face, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut trousers
